infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TruthScope uses the camera to measure your pulse rate through photoplethysmography (PPG) for biometric analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TruthScope uses the microphone to analyze vocal stress patterns including pitch variation and micro-tremors.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: TruthScope uses Face ID for secure app access.
